title: Eliminate module-level mutable state and import-time side effects
acceptance_criteria: server.ts:721 clientSockets Map encapsulated in class or factory
auth.ts:233 defaultTokenManager wrapped in factory function
broadcaster.ts:130 initSequenceFromDB() moved out of module-level call
agent-adapters/mod.ts:88-93 singleton registry creation moved to explicit init
model-discovery.ts:17-38 initializeAdapters() moved to startup, not import
message-queue.ts:204 globalMessageQueue replaced with createMessageQueue() factory
